author: Claude Code
content:
Implementation complete. Changes:

- `init.sh`: Interactive user registration (email + 2-4 letter slug), validates uniqueness, stores in `.env` and config team array. `--update` mode checks for missing slug.
- `server.ts` + `.project/server.ts`: Added `getCurrentUserSlug()`, `getUserCounter()`, `saveUserCounter()`. `createIssue()` now uses per-user counters. Updated 3 regex patterns for new ID format.
- `.project/counters/{slug}.json`: Per-user counter files, seeded from `nextId` on migration.
- `.gitignore`: Added `.project/issues_index.json` (rebuilt on startup).
- Skills: Updated `create-issue` and `track-work` for new counter flow.
- `CLAUDE.md`: Updated ID format examples and workflow docs.
- Template synced: `server.ts`, skills, `CLAUDE.md`.

All tests passed: new IDs use `PROJ-rp-N` format, old `PROJ-N` issues still accessible, counter files work independently per user.
